about_text: MSc graduate in Music and Acoustic Engineering, specialized in deep learning applied to audio. Experienced in signal analysis, generative models, and interactive audio systems. Interested in applied research and real-world innovation in sound and music technology.
about_closing: Open to roles at companies working with audio, music technology, or creative AI — wherever the product has sound at its core. Based in Milan, open to relocation.
proj_shy_order_title: SHY ORDER — AUTONOMOUS VOICE AGENT WITH OUTBOUND CALLING

proj_beat_bullet3: Integrated Google OAuth, multilingual support (IT/EN/ES), WaveSurfer.js audio player with waveform visualization, and direct-to-storage upload bypassing serverless payload limits

proj_invoice_bullet2: Syncs Google Calendar sessions to Notion; auto-books on third-party platforms
proj_invoice_bullet3: Runs daily across invoicing, email dispatch, session logging, and booking
